# Vendored cel-spec conformance test data

Files `*.textproto` are copied verbatim from
https://github.com/google/cel-spec at commit
`b8622f1b5c07e99e8171b0f3cff91cd7e41c8f19` (`tests/simple/testdata/`).

Schema: `cel.expr.conformance.test.SimpleTestFile`
(`proto/cel/expr/conformance/test/simple.proto` in the same repo).

Licensed under the Apache License 2.0, see `LICENSE.cel-spec`.

To update: copy fresh files from the cel-spec repo and bump the commit hash above.
